name: skill-aggregator
description: A smart learning content aggregator that helps people master new skills faster

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:risk: npm run test:backend -- --runInBand src/__tests__/billing.test.js src/__tests__/premiumPlan.test.js src/__tests__/subscriptionAccess.test.js src/__tests__/notifications.test.js src/__tests__/api.test.js && npm run test:frontend -- --run src/__tests__/LearningPlanPage.test.jsx src/__tests__/NotificationBell.test.jsx src/__tests__/HomePage.test.jsx

author: Brent & Jarvis
